messages.body: Ok
In my nank the first withdraw went through  another one is also pending. Plesse cancel automaric payment
However, the refund has already been credited to your account
Hello Margaret,  As mentioned above, I’ve already informed the finance team about the cancellation and it will be done soon.   Your patience is highly appreciated!
Please note, we’ve refunded the Novembers payment already
Please go ahead and remove zoca book now from my google profile.

Hello Margaret,  Hope you’re doing well :)  I’m extremely sorry for the inconvenience caused. Please note that the same will be refunded back to your account within the next 24 hours.  Feel free to reach out to me here i…
Your company just intiated another payment of $199 while I already canceled the subscription please return the money back to my bank and stop taking more payment
Ok thanks
Hi Margaret, we have already initiated the cancellation process and as mentioned above - you wont be charged going forward.
Hello Margaret,  Hope you’re doing well :)  This is to inform you that we initiate the cancellation of your account and there will be no charges going forward!
Ok thanks
Pleass go ahead and unsubscribe my account iam unable to do it from end
Iam unable to unsubscribe from my end please close it
I would like to cancel my zoca subscription as of today 11/11/25. SO don\'t deduct any more money from my account. Thanks Margaret from WILMARWELL LLC  I emailed this to your email yesterday

Hi. What have you guys been doing since you started advertising my business. I don\'t see any changes yet. My business is mot ranking anywhere. Last time I talked to monisha she told me that without review it will be dif…
Hello Margaret! I hope you are good.
What's the matter? What went wrong?
I have asked them but they have not responded so still waiting

Hello Margaret,  I understand how important the profile optimization is, but at the end of the day, reviews are what make the real difference. Without reviews, even the best-optimized profile won’t have the impact we’re …

Hey Margaret,  I wanted to understand if you could get some reviews from friends and family? We need to start working on reviews so that the optimisation starts working well.   Would you be able to do this? Also give me …

Hey Margaret,  It was lovely speaking with you!   Let me get back to you regarding the plan of action and get back to you in 1-2 days.   Feel free to reach out to me here in case you need any assistance :)
Let’s do it now
Sure thanks
You’re welcome :)
It's 11 now
Hello Margaret,   So sorry, I’ve been in back to back meetings.   Can we do this in an hour?
Sure in an hour you mean 1 pm rigjt?
Now yes
Sure 11 today yes. Please send a link and remind me

Hi, Margaret. Monisha from Zoka. How are you? I'm okay, my dear. How are you? I'm doing great. Thank you. We've been going back and forth about the meeting. Can we do it now, if you're free? Yeah, we can meet. Okay. Perf…
Hello,  Does 11 AM work for you?
Ok  Wednesday the 5th
Hello Margaret,  Hope you’re doing well! :)  Please note that we don’t work on weekends and hence there was no response.   Kindly let me know your availability this week so we can chat.
I have been tryinv to get intouch with you. Please schecheduke appointment so we could talk
I started a new job yesterday and I was in the middle of the road, but I totally forgot because there was nothing reminded me about the meeting at all.
Iam so sorry I forgot. When sre you available? Are available today 11/1?
Hello Margaret,  I’m waiting in the meeting room. Would you be joining?
You wanted to sit with the website team to make the edits right?   Let me know if we can do it on Monday
If you want, we can make the changes while keeping the landing page live. Or we can publish it again after making changes
Hello
That was me Margaret testing if booking working

Hey Margaret,  It was lovely speaking with you :)   I’ve shared the summary of our meeting on your email id. Please do give it a read.   We’ll connect again on 31st October at 7 AM. The link has been shared on your mail …
Margaret,  I spoke to Hriday and he said you needed website changes before publishing the landing page.
Good Monisha
That's what he said he was gonna do some changes before landing page? So what's next
But we published it already. Do you want to remove it until it’s ready?
